inputs.text: Bachcha ko bukhar hai, bahut thakawat mehsoos ho raha hai, sar dard bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Mild fever and fatigue are common symptoms of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Although less likely, bronchitis can also cause similar symptoms

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Tuberculosis is less likely at this stage without other specific symptoms

inputs.text: Bachcha ko sukhhi khaansi ho rahi hai, kabhi-kabhi thodi si thakaan bhi mehsoos ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: The onset of dry cough makes bronchitis a more likely diagnosis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever could still be a cause, but the cough suggests another possibility

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Tuberculosis is still less likely without more specific symptoms like night sweats or significant weight loss

inputs.text: Bachcha ko raat ko pasina aata hai, wazan bhi kam ho raha hai, aur khaansi ab 2 hafte se zyada ho gayi hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: The combination of night sweats, weight loss, and prolonged cough strongly suggests tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Bronchitis is less likely given the severity of symptoms like night sweats and significant weight loss

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Pneumonia could be considered but the chronic nature of symptoms points more towards tuberculosis

inputs.text: Bachcha ki halat aur bhi bigad gayi hai, bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, aur kabhi-kabhi khaansi mein khoon bhi aa raha hai
inputs.image_desc: visible severe weight loss, signs of anemia

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: The presence of blood in sputum and severe weakness confirms the diagnosis of tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the severity and nature of symptoms

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out as the symptoms have progressed beyond what is typical for pneumonia
